2343410.name: Don't Destroy The Rocket
2343410.description:
Control a rocket in this atmospheric 2D action-platformer. The goal is to get them from the launch pad to the finish. Of course, there are some obstacles and challenges in the way. Will you manage to beat all levels?

What can you expect after the purchase?

  • A total of 8 levels that get progressively more difficult.
  • Module system to improve your rocket and advance in levels.
  • Collectables to find and collect.
  • Steam achievements for completing milestones in the game.

Facts about the game:

  • The game is 2D and has a minimalistic style. Few colors, lots of atmosphere.
  • The game is played with keyboard and mouse. No controller support at the moment.
  • It takes little to learn the controls, but a lot to master them ;)
